name: Tufte CSS
when_to_use: 需要带边注、旁注编号和紧凑图文节奏的研究简报或讲义时用它而非手写 CSS，因为原生在边注浮动、窄屏回流和 ET Book 字感的一致性上失败；非做通用应用 UI。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能仿出约 70% 的 Tufte 外观，做不到稳定复现 margin-toggle/sidenote 配对、边注编号、窄屏降级和字体度量；该 CSS 把这些易碎规则固化为可检索的语义 HTML 契约。

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of hand-writing CSS when you need a research brief or lecture note with sidenotes, numbered margin notes, and compact text-image rhythm, because native implementations fail at sidenote floats, narrow-screen reflow, and a consistent ET Book feel; not for general application UI.
en.why_valuable: AI can normally imitate about 70% of the Tufte appearance but cannot reliably reproduce margin-toggle/sidenote pairing, sidenote numbering, narrow-screen fallback, and font metrics; this CSS fixes these fragile rules into a searchable semantic HTML contract.

data_in.note: Input is a trusted semantic HTML string; a sidenote must preserve label.margin-toggle + input.margin-toggle + span.sidenote/marginnote as siblings. The CSS does not parse Markdown.

schema.html: string -- semantic HTML; body content usually lives in article, and a sidenote-toggle label's for must equal the adjacent input.margin-toggle id

data_in.note: 输入是可信的语义 HTML 字符串；边注必须保持 label.margin-toggle + input.margin-toggle + span.sidenote/marginnote 的同级结构，CSS 不解析 Markdown。

schema.html: string —— 语义 HTML；正文通常放在 article 内，边注开关 label 的 for 必须等于相邻 input.margin-toggle 的 id
schema.max_width?: number —— 根容器最大宽度（px），默认 1400

example._why: 边注 DOM 配对高歧义；minimal 固定上游真正识别的 class/for/id 结构。

minimal.html:
Research note

正文边注内容

carriers.widget: conditional:CSS link 必须放入 shadowRoot；ET Book 字体由该 CSS 相对路径继续从同一 jsDelivr 包加载，宿主需允许 font-cdn
carriers.codex: supported:纯 CSS + 语义 HTML；无 wasm、worker 或 uplink 需求

isolation.evidence: 纯 CSS 无 JS 运行时,不自行注入任何位置;widget boot 把 <link> 落 shadowRoot(shadowRoot.append(css, el))而非 document.head→无全局注入=globalStyleInjection no。边注开关用 input.margin-toggle 复选框 + CSS :checked,无 JS→globalEvents no;仅 innerHTML 进 article,不动 body→globalDomMutation no。conditional 原因:tufte.min.css 含 html{font-size:15px}/body{width:87.5%} 等裸元素基样式,shadowRoot 内无 html/body 匹配→基准字号/宽度失效(.sidenote/.marginnote 类规则仍生效),widget 已如实标 conditional。警示:若误落 document.head,article/p/section/blockquote 等裸选择器会全局重排宿主页。
